allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST https://graphqlpokemon.favware.tech/v8 -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":"{ __schema { queryType { fields { name description args { name type { name kind ofType { name } } } } } } }"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://graphqlpokemon.favware.tech/v8 -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":"{ getAllPokemon\(offset: 89, take: 2\) { key species num types { name } baseStats { hp attack defense specialattack specialdefense speed } baseStatsTotal sprite color height weight } }"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://graphqlpokemon.favware.tech/v8 -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":"{ getPokemonByDexNumber\(number: 25\) { key species num types { name } baseStats { hp attack defense specialattack specialdefense speed } baseStatsTotal sprite color height weight flavorTexts { game flavor } abilities { first { name } second { name } hidden { name } } } }"}')
